summary: Hand-built internal/gplay Play Store client and all 16 commands; only 'categories list' is generator-emitted.
reason: Play serves positional protojson (AF_initDataCallback ds: keys + batchexecute RPC framing), which the generator's typed-endpoint path cannot parse, so the client, snapshot store, and command layer were authored by hand and the 7 generated novel stubs were replaced in place.
validated_outcome: All 10 absorbed + 7 transcendence commands verified live against play.google.com; shipcheck 6/6, full dogfood 61/61.
